overrides.description: Retain every qualified Release 1214 layer, assign Release 1215, and load focused dam mechanisms
Add physical dam diagnostics, tool routing, canonical gate operation, leak consequences, and recap state

preserved_canonical_state: GATE-FLAG remains the yellow/brown turning interlock
GATES-OPEN still changes only through BOLT-F with the real wrench
I-RFILL and I-REMPTY retain the original eight-turn reservoir timing
the blue button still creates the real maintenance leak
PUTTY and FIX-MAINT-LEAK retain the original repair consequence
the red button still controls only maintenance-room lighting
excluded_scope: new spells or magical dam controls
Hidden Glade and character alternate ports
